name: Shrimp Au Courvoisier
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Beat the butter with garlic and salt until light and fluffy.
3. Add the chopped parsley and Courvoisier to the mixture; stir well.
4. Mix in the toasted bread crumbs.
5. Preheat the oven to 40 degrees F (4 degrees C).
6. Coat each shrimp with the mixture and arrange them snugly in a casserole dish.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, then broil under low heat for an additional 2 minutes or until lightly browned.
